import pandas as pd


def update_prices(df):
    mask = df["category"] == "electronics"
    df.loc[mask, "price"] = df.loc[mask, "price"] * 1.1
    return df


def fix_names(df):
    df["name"] = df["name"].fillna("unknown")
    return df


def adjust_quantities(df):
    mask = df["status"] == "active"
    df.loc[mask, "quantity"] = df.loc[mask, "quantity"].clip(lower=1)
    return df


def correct_emails(df):
    mask = df["email"].str.contains("@")
    df.loc[mask, "verified"] = True
    return df
